details: The agent ran multiple kubectl-axi commands against the cluster (triage, deploy, deploy view, pods, pods view) and correctly identified both required elements: (1) the rollout is stuck with Progressing=False/ProgressDeadlineExceeded on the checkout deployment, and (2) the root cause is the invalid image 'nginx:2.0-does-not-exist' causing ImagePullBackOff on the new v2 pod while the three original v1 pods (nginx:1.27-alpine) continue serving traffic.
